text:
port for contool, an openlook console tool.

Fix: 

ftp://ftp.cdrom.com/pub/FreeBSD/incoming/contool.tgz

ftp://ftp.kfu.com/pub/contool-3.3a-port.tgz

The resulting package is in ftp://ftp.kfu.com/pub/contool-3.3a-pkg.tgz
